title: hieracium arragonense subsp. microsphaerellum
intro: Hieracium arragonense subsp. microsphaerellum is a subspecies of the Hieracium genus, commonly known as hawk's beard, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. The plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and inflammation due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Hieracium arragonense subsp. microsphaerellum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them in tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
